allow: Bash(docker exec e-tech-market-backend-1 php artisan migrate)
Bash(docker exec e-tech-market-backend-1 php artisan migrate:status)

Bash(docker exec e-tech-market-backend-1 php -r "require ''vendor/autoload.php''; $app = require_once ''bootstrap/app.php''; $app->make\(''Illuminate\\Contracts\\Console\\Kernel''\)->bootstrap\(\); use Illuminate\\Support\\Facades\\Schema; use Illuminate\\Database\\Schema\\Blueprint; Schema::table\(''products'', function\(Blueprint $t\) { $t->index\(''is_active''\); $t->index\([''is_active'',''created_at'']\); $t->index\([''is_active'',''is_featured'']\); $t->index\([''is_active'',''category_id'']\); }\); Schema::table\(''product_variants'', function\(Blueprint $t\) { $t->index\([''product_id'',''is_active'',''price'']\); }\); echo ''Done!''; ")

Bash(docker exec e-tech-market-nginx-1 bash -c "curl -s -H ''Accept-Encoding: gzip, deflate'' ''http://backend:9000/api/v1/products?limit=2'' -w ''\\nSize: %{size_download} bytes\\nTime: %{time_total}s\\n'' -o /dev/null")

Bash(docker exec e-tech-market-nginx-1 sh -c "curl -s -H ''Accept-Encoding: gzip, deflate'' ''http://backend:9000/api/v1/products?limit=2'' -w ''Size: %{size_download} bytes Time: %{time_total}s'' -o /dev/null")
